metaTitle: Tip Calculator — Fast Bill Splitting & Gratuity Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate tips and split bills instantly. Perfect for restaurants and group dining. 100% free, works offline, and keeps your data private.
introSummary: Our professional Tip Calculator is the perfect companion for dining out, traveling, and group social events. Whether you're navigating international tipping etiquette or splitting a large dinner bill among friends, our tool provides instant, error-free calculations. Designed for speed and privacy, it works entirely on your device—making it ideal for restaurants with poor cellular signal. No ads, no sign-ups, just a clean utility to handle your gratuity and per-person shares in seconds.

contextUsage.title: For International Travelers
contextUsage.desc: Quickly determine the correct gratuity based on local standards (15%, 18%, or 20%) while dining in countries with established tipping cultures.

contextUsage.title: For Group Dining & Socializing
contextUsage.desc: Effortlessly split the total bill, including tax and tip, among up to 50 people to ensure everyone pays their fair share accurately.

contextUsage.title: For Service Industry Workers
contextUsage.desc: Easily calculate expected gratuity on pre-tax totals to verify receipts and manage earnings with transparency.

howto.description: Enter the total amount from your receipt. You can use either the pre-tax or after-tax total depending on your preference.
Choose from standard presets (15%, 18%, 20%, 25%) or enter a custom percentage for exceptional service.
Adjust the 'Split' slider to the number of people in your party. The 'Per Person' total updates instantly as you slide.
Review the calculated tip amount, the new total bill, and exactly what each individual owes including their share of the tip.

why: Instant Calculations — No 'Calculate' button required. Results update in real-time as you change the bill amount, tip, or number of people.
Flexible Splitting — Split the bill between 1 and 100 people, making it suitable for everything from dates to large corporate banquets.
Custom Gratuity — Full control to enter any tip percentage, allowing you to reward service exactly as you see fit.
Privacy-First & Offline — Your financial data never leaves your phone. Works perfectly in basement restaurants or remote areas without Wi-Fi.
Clean & Minimalist — Designed for mobile-first use at the table. No distracting ads or unnecessary menus—just the numbers you need.
Zero Cost Forever — A completely free utility with no hidden fees, subscriptions, or 'Pro' versions.

faq.q: What is the standard tip percentage in the US?
faq.a: The standard is 15-20% for sit-down service. 18% is typical for good service, while 20% or more is common for excellent service or in major metropolitan areas.

faq.q: Should I tip on the pre-tax or post-tax total?
faq.a: Etiquette traditionally suggests tipping on the pre-tax amount. However, many people now tip on the full total for simplicity. Our tool supports both—just enter the amount you prefer.

faq.q: Does this tool store my bill information?
faq.a: No. This is a client-side utility. All calculations happen in your browser's temporary memory and are wiped as soon as you close the tab.

faq.q: What if the restaurant already included a service charge?
faq.a: Check your bill for 'Auto-Gratuity' (common for parties of 6 or more). If a service charge is already included, you are not usually expected to tip extra unless you wish to.

faq.q: Can I split the bill unevenly?
faq.a: This tool calculates an even split. For uneven splits, use the total bill result and divide manually based on individual orders.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Suitable for large parties and events
No logs or history kept for total anonymity
Easy one-handed input at the dinner table

troubleshooting: Per-person amount looks wrong? Ensure the 'Split' value accurately reflects the number of paying guests in your group.
Calculation not updating? Make sure your browser's JavaScript is enabled. The tool performs all math locally on your device.
Keyboard covering the result? On some mobile devices, tap outside the input field to hide the keyboard and see the full breakdown.
proTips: Rounding Tip: Many people like to round the total bill to the nearest dollar. You can adjust the custom tip percentage slightly to achieve an even total.
Service Tip: If you're at a buffet or a coffee shop, a smaller tip (10% or a few dollars) is often acceptable compared to full-service dining.
Travel Tip: Keep this page bookmarked on your phone's home screen for quick access while traveling abroad to avoid awkward tipping mistakes.
